metadata.notes: Visa summaries are structured from official immigration guidance for planning only. Users must verify requirements, documents, and processing with Hi Korea or the relevant Korean diplomatic mission before applying.

description: General training visa often used for Korean language study or non-degree training at eligible institutions.
eligibility: Admission to an eligible language or training program
documents: Certificate of admission or training confirmation
processing_time: Varies by embassy, immigration office, and applicant circumstances; confirm officially.
renewal: Renew before expiry with attendance, enrollment, and financial proof where required.
notes: Often used before degree study, but work permission and stay rules should be verified carefully.
